description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular self-service payment kiosk or terminal, commonly found in laundromats or public utility spaces. The front features a prominent upper section with a display screen, a payment interface, and a compartment for user interaction, likely for inserting or retrieving items. The lower section has a flat surface with a lid, possibly for depositing or collecting laundry, and a control panel with buttons and slots. The exterior is primarily a light, off-white color with some black and blue signage, including Japanese text and pictograms. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or interactive elements. The overall construction appears robust, with a metal body and plastic components for the interface and display.
description: A tall, off-white self-service payment kiosk with a display screen, payment interface, and signage, typically used in laundromats or public spaces. The front features interactive panels and compartments, while the sides and back are plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, payment interface, signage, and main user interaction areas.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the depth and stacked structure, with no visible interactive elements.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, featureless back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the kiosk's depth and stacked design.
attribute_display_screen: A rectangular display screen is present on the upper front section, oriented vertically with a black bezel and visible interface elements.
attribute_payment_interface: A card reader and payment slot are located on the upper front, adjacent to the display, with a keypad and possible NFC tap area.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Printed branding with Japanese text and pictograms is visible on the front, above and below the display, in black and blue.
attribute_instructional_signage: Instructional signage with Japanese text and pictograms is present on the front, above the display and on the lower compartment, in a printed style.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small horizontal slot below the payment interface on the front likely serves as a receipt dispenser, easily accessible to users.
